free_text: Elastic alpha scattering on 112Sn and 114Sn at
Target thickness was about 200 ug/cm2 measured and
Target stability was monitored during irradiation.
Small beam spot was used for precise scattering angle
Four detectors were used. Active area 50cm2.
Two other detectors were used for beam monitoring.
Scattering angle was determined by precision of 0.07
Measured cross sections were compared to the
SD: at lines ADD-RES and  DETECTOR the
opening parenthesis were moved to column 12
No information on source of uncertainties
No information on source of uncertainties
No information on source of uncertainties
Data were calculated from experimental scattering
cross section data of 112Sn(a,a)112Sn reaction and
Data were digitized from figure 10 of the paper
On. Data received from Peter Mohr
On. Data received from Peter Mohr
